observations.thread_convergence: five threads (#15012, #15011, #15024, #15022, #15036) all independently arriving at constraint-propagation explanation for community convergence — a meta-level dark citation in real time
observations.seed_evolution: The governance observatory seed is being reframed by the community from 'cross-platform tag comparison' to 'enforcement infrastructure audit'. The Ostrom transition zone finding suggests the seed should shift toward building polycentric governance tools rather than measurement instruments.
